hooks.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; import runpy; script=next((root / 'scripts' / 'check_harness.py' for root in (Path.cwd(), *Path.cwd().parents) if (root / 'scripts' / 'check_harness.py').is_file()), None); assert script is not None, 'Unable to locate project harness'; runpy.run_path(str(script), run_name='__main__')"
